description: Declarative source for the ai_studio refactor tree. The architecture map page is only a renderer; serve ai_studio/architecture_map/index.html and validate this JSON with ai_studio/architecture_map/validate_map.mjs.

root.title: ai_studio/
root.subtitle: refactor root
root.description: Clean refactor tree. Start with Core Harness only; promote modules from Not Refactored after review, cleanup, owner assignment, and compatibility checks.

children.title: ai_studio/README.md
children.description: AI Studio root index: describes available capabilities, task routing, migration rules, map ownership, and where to go for each kind of work.
children.role: AI Studio root capability index and router

children.title: Studio Shell
children.subtitle: single UI entry point
children.description: Shared browser shell for AI Studio surfaces: home, persistent navigation, collapse state, theme, and unified local serving. It hosts surfaces but does not own module domain logic.

children.title: README.md
children.description: Studio Shell module contract: owns the shared browser shell, defines surface vs module ownership, and lists hosted surfaces.

children.title: Home Surface
children.description: AI Studio home surface: opens the architecture map, taskboard, tree source, and validation report from one local URL.

children.title: server.mjs
children.description: Unified local server for AI Studio home, Architecture Map surface, Taskboard surface, tree.json, validation report, and Taskboard API routes.

children.title: start_site.mjs
children.description: Stable launcher for the AI Studio local site. Starts the server in the background, writes PID and logs, verifies the page, supports --open, --restart, and --port.

children.title: start_site.cmd
children.description: Small Windows wrapper for the Windows-safe AI Studio launcher.
children.role: Windows AI Studio site launch helper

children.title: start_site_windows.ps1
children.description: Windows-safe detached launcher for Codex and local browser use. It avoids managed-shell child-process cleanup, writes PID/log files, waits for HTTP readiness, and supports -Restart, -Open, and -Port.
children.role: Windows-safe AI Studio site launch helper

children.title: Shared UI Implementation
children.subtitle: css/js internals
children.description: Low-level browser files for the shared AI Studio shell. Hidden from the default graph so Studio Shell stays readable as one architectural surface.

children.title: home.css
children.description: AI Studio home-surface content styling. The shared navigation shell is owned by studio_shell.css and studio_shell.js.

children.title: studio_shell.css
children.description: Shared dark AI Studio app shell: persistent left navigation, collapsed navigation state, page content area, and responsive sidebar behavior.

children.title: studio_shell.js
children.description: Shared browser behavior for the AI Studio left sidebar: collapse and expand toggle with localStorage persistence.

children.title: App Tunnel
children.subtitle: temporary public URL
children.description: Studio Shell helper for serving a self-contained local directory and exposing it through a temporary public cloudflared quick tunnel for phone or external-device review.

children.title: README.md
children.description: App Tunnel contract: what may be served, public URL risks, and generated cloudflared cache location.

children.title: serve_tunnel.mjs
children.description: Command that starts a local static server, runs a cloudflared quick tunnel, and prints a temporary public URL.

children.title: nt-app-tunnel
children.description: Skill surface for sharing local AI Studio surfaces, asset viewer exports, static pages, or wasm builds through a temporary public tunnel.

children.title: Bootstrap
children.subtitle: project and game creation
children.description: AI Studio bootstrap module for copying the template into a new game, exporting the reusable AI Studio base, and documenting the template copy model. It may call Asset Storage registries but does not own asset manifests or license policy.

children.title: README.md
children.description: Bootstrap module contract: role, commands, boundaries, and why bootstrap is not asset storage.

children.title: new_game.mjs
children.description: Copies template/ into a new game folder and registers that game asset root through Asset Storage.

children.title: new_game.test.mjs
children.description: Regression tests proving new_game copies template files and registers game asset roots without touching the real repository.

children.title: export_base.mjs
children.description: Exports the reusable AI Studio base into another project and regenerates agent surfaces in the target.

children.title: export_base.test.mjs
children.description: Regression test proving portable export includes AI Studio, taskboard, quality, asset modules, skills, and generated agent-surface checks.

children.title: template_paths.mjs
children.description: Declarative template copy model notes and path groups for universal, seed, shared-library, and game-only files.

children.title: TEMPLATE.md
children.description: Human explanation of the template copy model, reuse tiers, systems showcase, seed shell, and game-only boundaries.

children.title: Game Project
children.subtitle: active game and playable iteration
children.description: AI Studio module for active game routing, GAME_PROJECT.md orientation, new prototype kickoff, compact pre-implementation context packs, playable feature iteration, and schema-first game state workflow.

children.title: README.md
children.description: Game Project module contract: active-game routing, prototype kickoff, iteration context, and boundaries against bootstrap, taskboard, assets, and GDD/design ownership.

children.title: new_prototype.mjs
children.description: Creates the first project wiki, GAME_PROJECT.md routing, taskboard epic/task, and startup gate context for a new prototype.

children.title: iteration_context.mjs
children.description: Builds a compact pre-implementation context pack for playable game work from GAME_PROJECT.md, taskboard, project docs, and runtime sources.

children.title: Feature Iteration Workflow
children.subtitle: small playable slices
children.description: Workflow docs for implementing, validating, reviewing, and handing off small current-game playable feature increments.

children.title: README.md
children.description: Feature Iteration Workflow contract: use cases, flow, files, and module boundaries.

children.title: iteration_cycle.md
children.description: Playable iteration cycle: orient, choose one goal, write task packet, implement, validate, capture evidence, review, update state, and commit.

children.title: playable_gates.md
children.description: Routing for reference-driven work, quality checks, runtime proof, build/release tasks, and prototype handoff evidence.

children.title: State Management
children.subtitle: schema-first game state
children.description: Workflow and generator for schema-first game state, generated C GameState APIs, JSON save/load, versioned migrations, fixtures, and DevAPI state commands.

children.title: README.md
children.description: State Management module contract: use cases, files, commands, default schema/output routing, and skill surface.

children.title: contract.md
children.description: State contract for documents, save envelope, logical storage keys, generated API, dirty/autosave behavior, migrations, and domain actions.

children.title: workflow.md
children.description: Schema-first state change workflow: inspect schema, change generator/template, regenerate, add fixtures/migrations, and prove save/load behavior.

children.title: review.md
children.description: State management review checklist and failure signals for schema, generated API, migrations, DevAPI, fixtures, and saves.

children.title: generate_state.py
children.description: Generates C GameState headers/sources and DevAPI glue from a versioned JSON state schema.

children.title: game_state.c.in
children.description: Template used by the state generator for generated `game_state.c` source output.

children.title: generate_state_test.py
children.description: Regression tests for the state generator's schema-to-C output, id stability, reserved fields, and variants.

children.title: nt-game-feature-iteration
children.description: Skill surface for implementing one focused playable game feature change with validation and evidence.

children.title: nt-game-state-management
children.description: Skill surface for schema-first game state work: generated GameState APIs, save/load, migrations, DevAPI state commands, fixtures, and state review.

children.title: game_project.test.mjs
children.description: Regression tests for new prototype kickoff, active-game detection, startup gates, and generated iteration context packs.

children.title: GAME_PROJECT.md
children.description: Repository root active-game routing file. Load only for game-specific work; keep lore, balance, GDD detail, and task state elsewhere.

children.title: Runtime Automation
children.subtitle: DevAPI proof helpers
children.description: AI Studio module for local runtime proof automation: DevAPI client/CLI, native iteration helper, screenshots, video capture, PNG codec, pixel health, UI readability, and live-state capture matrices.

children.title: README.md
children.description: Runtime Automation module contract: local DevAPI client, screenshot capture, runtime proof helpers, pixel health, UI readability, and module boundaries.

children.title: nt-runtime-automation
children.description: Runtime Automation skill router for DevAPI discovery, native iteration, screenshots, recordings, pixel health, UI readability, and live-state evidence collection.

children.title: runtime-workflow-rules.md
children.description: Reference for runtime launch/reuse rhythm, evidence paths, shared AI Studio runtime helpers, and module boundaries.

children.title: devapi-pattern.md
children.description: Reference for DevAPI discovery, command metadata, UI/input, frame.wait sequencing, shared client usage, capture flow, and release gate boundaries.

children.title: visual-qa-checklist.md
children.description: Reference for collecting visual runtime evidence with screenshots, recordings, pixel health, readability checks, and stable-frame proof.

children.title: devapi_client.py
children.description: Synchronous Python harness for the game DevAPI TCP command bus, native launch/reuse, screenshot capture, frame waits, and recording helpers.

children.title: devapi_cli.py
children.description: Minimal JSON command-line client for the game DevAPI TCP command bus.

children.title: iterate.py
children.description: One-command native visual iteration loop: build if stale, launch/reuse game, capture screenshot, and run UI readability audit.

children.title: state_capture.py
children.description: Universal multi-state screenshot capture helper that writes game.live_state_acceptance_matrix evidence JSON.

children.title: state_capture_test.py
children.description: Tests for StateCapture coverage, debt, idempotent recapture, and review-tool shot arguments.

children.title: pixel_health.py
children.description: Lightweight PNG pixel-health checks for blank, flat, or malformed screenshot evidence.

children.title: ui_readability.py
children.description: UI/text readability zoom audit that crops and upscales screenshot bands and flags text-on-bright-background risks.

children.title: png_io.py
children.description: Dependency-free PNG encode/decode utility shared by capture, framebuffer conversion, and pixel health.

children.title: png_io_test.py
children.description: Tests for the dependency-free PNG codec.

children.title: capture_window.py
children.description: Windows window screenshot capture helper with PNG output.

children.title: capture_screen.ps1
children.description: PowerShell screenshot capture fallback for still screenshots.

children.title: record_screen_ffmpeg.ps1
children.description: PowerShell/ffmpeg screen recording helper for gameplay video evidence.

children.title: Core Harness
children.subtitle: ai_studio/core_harness
children.description: Harness, agent-facing contract, AGENTS.md, root compatibility surfaces, passive profiling, and the smallest public entry points needed to start work.
Core Harness module contract: what belongs in the always-nearby harness, what is only a compatibility surface, and how Core routes into workflow, orchestration, and validation.
Repo-level harness contract loaded by agents: repository role, AI Studio direction, current-game routing, hard invariants, and context routes.
Compatibility pointer for Claude-facing harnesses; should stay generated or thin and route back to AGENTS.md.

children.title: Workflow
children.subtitle: task execution order
children.description: Core Harness workflow group: local process for context loading, work loop, validation handoff, and delegation checkpoint.
children.role: agent task workflow inside the harness

children.description: Canonical Workflow contract: context policy, lead-agent work loop, validation handoff, and delegation checkpoint.

children.title: Orchestration
children.subtitle: early subagent split
children.description: Child rule inside Workflow for broad read-heavy work. Keeps subagent use lightweight with Task / Scope / Return / Stop packets; it is not a product, task store, or public CLI.
children.role: workflow delegation trigger and packet shape

children.description: Short orchestration contract: when to split work, the simple packet format, lead responsibility, and boundary with Workflow and Taskboard.

children.title: Agent Surfaces
children.subtitle: generated Codex/Claude surfaces
children.description: Core Harness module for generated agent-facing compatibility surfaces: Claude skill pointers and Codex/Claude hook configs.
children.role: agent surface generation and drift checks

children.title: README.md
children.description: Agent Surfaces contract: canonical sources, generated outputs, command entrypoints, and module boundaries.

children.title: sync.mjs
children.description: Public Agent Surfaces facade that regenerates or checks all generated Codex/Claude compatibility files.

children.title: skills_sync.mjs
children.description: Generates .claude/skills thin pointers from Codex-discoverable .codex/skills entrypoints and removes stale generated pointers.

children.title: hooks_sync.mjs
children.description: Generates .codex/hooks.json and the hooks block of .claude/settings.json from one canonical hook source.

children.title: Generated Outputs
children.subtitle: Codex/Claude compatibility files
children.description: Generated compatibility files produced by Agent Surfaces. Edit the canonical source, not these outputs.

children.title: .codex/hooks.json
children.description: Generated Codex hook configuration rendered from hooks_sync.mjs.

children.title: .claude/settings.json
children.description: Generated Claude hook configuration. hooks_sync.mjs preserves Claude-only keys while replacing the hooks block.

children.title: .claude/skills/
children.description: Generated Claude skill pointer directory. Each pointer routes to the matching Codex-discoverable .codex/skills entrypoint.

children.title: Tests
children.subtitle: sync regressions
children.description: Regression tests for generated skill pointers and hook config rendering.

children.title: skills_sync.test.mjs
children.description: Regression tests for generated skill pointer creation, stale pointer detection, and hand-written skill preservation.

children.title: hooks_sync.test.mjs
children.description: Regression tests that hook generation reproduces committed Codex/Claude config and preserves tool-specific matcher vocabularies.

children.title: Profiling
children.subtitle: passive session telemetry
children.description: Core Harness profiling group: passive hook telemetry, Codex session recovery, status reports, subagent diagnostics, and NT chat-session reflection ownership.
children.role: agent execution observability inside the harness

children.title: README.md
children.description: Profiling module contract: Agent Surfaces owns hook config; Profiling owns recorder commands, status reports, Codex recovery, and reflection skill instructions.

children.title: status.mjs
children.description: Reads per-session profile JSONL and reports command durations, slow work, repeated commands, failures, coverage gaps, and optional subagent diagnostics.

children.title: hook_record.mjs
children.description: JS hook recorder fallback for command results, Codex failure recovery, manual --recover-only import, and subagent spawn telemetry. Called by generated hooks for non-hot-path cases.

children.title: hook_record_fast.c
children.description: Native fast hook recorder source for low-overhead SessionStart, PreToolUse, and PostToolUse command telemetry.

children.title: hook_record_fast.exe
children.description: Built Windows fast hook recorder used by generated Codex and Claude hook configs.

children.title: build_hook_record_fast.mjs
children.description: Build helper for the native fast hook recorder.

children.title: profile_lib.mjs
children.description: Shared profile path, JSONL, parsing, timestamp, command, and record helpers used by profiling commands.

children.title: agent_rollup.mjs
children.description: Best-effort subagent transcript diagnostics for Claude and Codex sessions. Diagnostic only, not an acceptance gate.

children.title: NT Chat Session Reflection Skill
children.subtitle: session retrospective instructions
children.description: Canonical skill instructions for full retrospective analysis of long AI-assisted sessions using durable evidence, profiling telemetry, and chat/session context.

children.title: .codex skill entrypoint
children.description: Codex-discoverable compatibility entrypoint that points to the canonical profiling-owned skill instructions.

children.title: profiling.test.mjs
children.description: Focused profiling regression tests for hook records, Codex recovery, status reports, coverage, and subagent rollups.

children.title: Validation
children.subtitle: fast route checks
children.description: Fast Core Harness validation for agent-facing docs, stale file references, and retired command routes. Module test suites stay with their owning modules.
children.role: core harness route and reference guard

children.description: Core validation contract: fast mechanical checks only; no global pipeline validation.
Mechanical guard for stale local references, missing files, and retired commands in agent-facing Markdown.
Regression tests for the stale-reference guard and retired command detection.

children.title: Tool Lib
children.subtitle: shared command helpers
children.description: Core Harness helper library for low-level AI Studio command-line tools: CLI failure paths, JSON IO, hashing, MIME lookup, path display, and temporary export copying. It is intentionally policy-free.
children.role: shared AI Studio tool helper library

children.title: README.md
children.description: Tool Lib contract: low-level helper ownership, boundaries, and what must not live in this shared layer.

children.title: cli.mjs
children.description: Shared low-level cli helper used by AI Studio command-line modules.

children.title: cli.test.mjs
children.description: Regression tests for the shared cli helper.

children.title: hash.mjs
children.description: Shared low-level hash helper used by AI Studio command-line modules.

children.title: json.mjs
children.description: Shared low-level json helper used by AI Studio command-line modules.

children.title: json.test.mjs
children.description: Regression tests for the shared json helper.

children.title: mime.mjs
children.description: Shared low-level mime helper used by AI Studio command-line modules.

children.title: mime.test.mjs
children.description: Regression tests for the shared mime helper.

children.title: paths.mjs
children.description: Shared low-level paths helper used by AI Studio command-line modules.

children.title: paths.test.mjs
children.description: Regression tests for the shared paths helper.

children.title: tmp_exports.mjs
children.description: Shared low-level tmp_exports helper used by AI Studio command-line modules.

children.title: tmp_exports.test.mjs
children.description: Regression tests for the shared tmp_exports helper.

children.title: tmp_sweep.mjs
children.description: Opt-in housekeeping command for reporting or deleting ignored `tmp/` scratch data while keeping the newest pipeline validation exports.

children.title: tmp_sweep.test.mjs
children.description: Regression tests for tmp scratch reporting, dry-run behavior, deletion guardrails, and validation export retention.

children.title: Taskboard
children.subtitle: tasks/ + ai_studio/taskboard
children.description: Durable project work state: tasks, epics, context digest, and task-store validation.
Taskboard contract for task files, statuses, task lifecycle, durable context, and task CLI usage.
Detailed task-store reference for fields, lifecycle, and maintenance rules.

children.title: nt-taskboard-manager
children.description: Thin Codex skill router for Taskboard work. It activates task capture, planning, reporting, and status updates, then routes agents to the Taskboard product/API contract.
Public Taskboard CLI for listing, context digest, task create/update, and task-store validation.
Taskboard implementation library: parsing, validation, context digest, task mutation, and task-state checks used by orchestration.
Taskboard HTTP API adapter for board payloads and task/epic CRUD routes. Studio Shell mounts it but does not own the Taskboard domain contract.
Taskboard browser surface. Served by Studio Shell; Taskboard owns the surface content, not the shared server.

children.title: Surface Implementation
children.subtitle: public static files
children.description: Static browser files behind the Taskboard surface. Hidden from the default graph so the page is represented as one surface unless implementation details are needed.

children.title: index.html
children.description: Taskboard browser document hosted at /taskboard/ by Studio Shell.

children.title: style.css
children.description: Taskboard page-specific styling. Shared navigation styling comes from Studio Shell.

children.title: app.js
children.description: Taskboard browser behavior for loading, editing, and rendering tasks through the shared Taskboard API.

children.title: markdown_preview.js
children.description: Small Markdown preview helper used by the Taskboard browser surface.
Taskboard regression tests for parsing, commands, context, validation, and task lifecycle behavior.

children.title: Assets
children.subtitle: reviewed asset tools
children.description: Reviewed AI Studio asset modules: browser viewing surfaces, source preparation, storage manifests, indexes, previews, and license routing.

children.title: README.md
children.description: Assets module contract: what has moved into AI Studio and which legacy asset-pipeline areas still need separate review.

children.title: nt-asset-workflow
children.description: Main AI Studio skill for asset source search, license/provenance routing, adding assets to games, promoting assets to the global library, restricted assets, previews, generated art jobs, and prepared asset validation.

children.title: source-library-and-license.md
children.description: Reference for searching the asset library, pulling assets into games, promoting assets into the global library, and applying the license gate.

children.title: restricted-assets.md
children.description: Reference for paid, account-gated, unknown-license, and non-redistributable assets that must not commit binaries.

children.title: generated-assets-and-cutouts.md
children.description: Reference for generated source art, cutout/chroma cleanup, crop plans, slice9 metadata, and final-art boundaries.

children.title: 3d-models.md
children.description: Reference for model sourcing, conversion, texture deduplication, and game-local engine pack/load integration.

children.title: textures-and-materials.md
children.description: Reference for standalone texture/material sourcing, tiling decisions, material maps, downloaded texture provenance, and seam checks.
children.role: texture and material asset workflow reference

children.title: nt-asset-image-generation
children.description: Asset-owned raster generation skill used only after source-first search fails. Owns image generation wrappers, fake-output checks, batch generation, compare mode, and handoff back to nt-asset-workflow.

children.title: generation-paths.md
children.description: Exact image generation command routes for Codex imagegen, fallback comparison mode, and REST/backend alternatives.

children.title: verification-and-prompts.md
children.description: Prompt and verification guidance for real raster generation, fake-output detection, composable asset prompts, and known dead ends.

children.title: throughput-and-handoff.md
children.description: Batch generation, source-sheet-first guidance, skip sidecars, and handoff back to Asset Workflow and quality checks.

children.title: Generation Scripts
children.description: Executable wrappers for image generation, compare mode, batch generation, and dual-plate soft-alpha generation.

children.title: codex_imagegen.sh
children.description: Shell wrapper that forces Codex CLI imagegen to create and write a real raster PNG, with fake-output size checks.

children.title: generate_image.py
children.description: Python image generation/edit helper using official REST with API key or Codex backend credentials, plus skip-if-unchanged sidecars.

children.title: gen_batch.py
children.description: Concurrent batch runner for multiple image generation jobs with dry-run, bounded concurrency, and unchanged-job skipping.

children.title: gen_both.sh
children.description: Compare-mode runner that generates the same prompt through Codex imagegen and Antigravity fallback for visual selection.

children.title: gen_dual_plate.sh
children.description: Soft-alpha dual-plate generation helper used by cutout prep when one flat-key source cannot recover fractional alpha.

children.title: Assets Storage
children.subtitle: sources, manifests, indexes, previews
children.description: Storage layer for asset source registries, editable pack manifests, generated SQLite indexes, agent search, license routing, and derived preview preparation. The browser viewer consumes this layer but does not own it.

children.title: README.md
children.description: Assets Storage module contract: source registries, pack manifests, generated SQLite indexes, preview preparation, agent search, and boundary with Asset Viewer.

children.title: search.mjs
children.description: Agent-facing asset search command over generated SQLite indexes. Supports query, kind, tags, origin, license, pack, JSON output, and custom source paths.

children.title: defaults.mjs
children.description: Shared Asset Storage defaults such as the global asset source root.

children.title: kinds.mjs
children.description: Canonical mapping from asset kind to storage directory names for manifest-first and legacy readers.

children.title: search.test.mjs
children.description: Regression test proving agent asset search uses the generated index for a pack manifest source.

children.title: Asset Intake
children.subtitle: stage, accept, reject
children.description: Manifest-first intake for new asset candidates. Stages files with provenance, accepts selected files into packs or restricted packs, and rejects staged candidates without writing alternate metadata records.

children.title: README.md
children.description: Asset Intake contract: stage, review, accept or reject, Pack Manifest output, restricted-pack routing, and command examples.

children.title: stage.mjs
children.description: Stages a file, folder, zip, or URL into _incoming with hashes, source page, license hint, and provenance log.

children.title: accept.mjs
children.description: Accepts one staged file into Pack Manifest layout, routing publishable assets to packs and non-publishable assets to restricted/packs.

children.title: reject.mjs
children.description: Rejects a staged candidate by moving it into _rejected or deleting it explicitly.

children.title: intake.test.mjs
children.description: Regression tests for staging, manifest accept, restricted accept, and reject behavior.

children.title: Source Registry
children.subtitle: explicit asset roots
children.description: Explicit registry for global libraries, templates, and game-local asset folders. Avoids guessing source folders by scanning roots.

children.title: README.md
children.description: Source Registry contract: why asset source roots are explicit and how global libraries, templates, and games are registered.

children.title: libraries.json
children.description: Explicit registry of global reusable asset libraries shown by Asset Viewer and used by asset CLI defaults.

children.title: libraries.mjs
children.description: Small helper for reading, listing, resolving, and upserting global library asset source records.

children.title: libraries.test.mjs
children.description: Regression tests for default library source listing, path resolution, and library source upserts.

children.title: templates.json
children.description: Explicit registry of template asset folders shown by Asset Viewer.

children.title: templates.mjs
children.description: Small helper for reading, listing, and upserting template asset source records.

children.title: templates.test.mjs
children.description: Regression tests for default template source listing and template source upserts.

children.title: games.json
children.description: Explicit registry of game-local asset folders shown by Asset Viewer. Updated by ai_studio/bootstrap/new_game.mjs.

children.title: games.mjs
children.description: Small helper for reading, listing, and upserting game asset source records.

children.title: games.test.mjs
children.description: Regression tests for creating, listing, normalizing, and upserting registered game asset sources.

children.title: Pack Manifest
children.subtitle: pack.json + assets.jsonl
children.description: Preferred editable canonical format for reviewed asset packs. Stores pack metadata in pack.json and one asset record per line in assets.jsonl; generated SQLite indexes consume it for fast search.

children.title: README.md
children.description: Pack Manifest contract: layout, pack.json fields, assets.jsonl rows, path boundary, and current Asset Index integration.

children.title: manifest.mjs
children.description: Reads packs/<pack-id>/pack.json and assets.jsonl into normalized asset records and pack summaries for Asset Index.

children.title: manifest.test.mjs
children.description: Regression tests for pack.json/assets.jsonl reading, inherited pack metadata, relative paths, previews, and model paths.

children.title: Source Snapshots
children.subtitle: generated file diff layer
children.description: Generated file snapshot layer for asset refresh. Tracks added, changed, and deleted source files under tmp so Asset Index can skip unchanged rebuilds and later support incremental row updates.

children.title: README.md
children.description: Source Snapshots contract: generated snapshot location, tracked files, refresh consumers, and boundary with preview refresh.

children.title: snapshots.mjs
children.description: Builds source file snapshots, compact signatures, persisted generated snapshots, and added/changed/deleted diffs for asset refresh.

children.title: snapshots.test.mjs
children.description: Regression tests for source snapshot diffing and generated snapshot persistence.

children.title: Asset Index
children.subtitle: sqlite query layer
children.description: Local SQLite indexes, one per asset source, built from pack manifests or folder scans. Serves fast page, search, filter, pack, and model lookups for Asset Viewer and agent search without rescanning sources on each request.

children.title: README.md
children.description: Asset Index contract: one generated SQLite database per source, explicit rebuild/refresh, public query API, no watch mode, and boundary with Pack Manifest, folder scans, and Asset Viewer.

children.title: index.mjs
children.description: Builds and queries the local asset SQLite index from pack manifests or folder scans.
children.role: asset index API and rebuild helper

children.title: index.test.mjs
children.description: Regression tests for index rebuild, pack summary, search, filters, facets, paging, and model lookup.

children.title: License Guard
children.subtitle: public repo safety
children.description: Public-repository guard for paid, private, unknown-license, non-redistributable, and attribution-bearing asset binaries. Unknown licenses fail closed; described restricted assets remain local under assets/restricted/.

children.title: README.md
children.description: License Guard contract: publishable vs restricted binaries, CC-BY attribution metadata, public-repo scope, and validation commands.

children.title: restricted.mjs
children.description: Compatibility policy facade used by pull and guard: publishability, restricted root, attribution/notice requirement checks, and binary extension classification.

children.title: registry.mjs
children.description: Canonical license decision registry for asset publishing: known licenses, custom-license defaults, attribution/notice requirements, and validation of publish decisions.

children.title: restricted_assets_guard.mjs
children.description: Validates git-tracked game/template asset binaries against manifest publishability and attribution metadata.

children.title: restricted_assets_allowlist.json
children.description: Narrow allowlist for existing publishable starter assets. New assets should be recorded in manifests instead of added here.

children.title: restricted_assets_guard.test.mjs
children.description: Regression tests for publishable assets, restricted routing, unregistered binaries, per-game paths, and CC-BY attribution metadata.

children.title: Preview Pipeline
children.subtitle: derived preview preparation
children.description: Local storage preparation for derived asset previews. Currently renders GLB thumbnails through Blender and writes previews back under previews/<asset-id>/.

children.title: README.md
children.description: Preview Pipeline contract: local preparation, Blender thumbnail generation, no watch mode, and viewer boundary.

children.title: cache.mjs
children.description: Source-aware preview cache refresh used by Asset Viewer. Copies or renders only missing/stale previews and refreshes the selected source index.

children.title: render_library_previews.mjs
children.description: Selects shared-library model assets and runs Blender thumbnail rendering in resumable chunks.

children.title: render_thumbs.py
children.description: Blender script that renders one isometric thumbnail per GLB using the shared studio HDR.

children.title: make_studio_hdr.py
children.description: Rebuilds the shared studio HDR used by Blender thumbnails and browser model-viewer lighting.

children.title: studio_env.hdr
children.description: Shared studio environment used by generated model thumbnails and live 3D model previews.

children.title: cache.test.mjs
children.description: Regression tests for missing, cached, and stale source-aware preview refresh.

children.title: Asset Prep
children.subtitle: source preparation before storage/project use
children.description: Preparation tools for asset source files before they enter storage, templates, or game projects: source-sheet checks, crop plans, cutout/alpha cleanup, review atlases, and texture previews.

children.title: README.md
children.description: Asset Prep contract: what preparation tools own, what they do not own, and the current source-sheet, crop, cutout, review-atlas, and texture groups.

children.title: Prep Library
children.subtitle: shared python helpers
children.description: Low-level Python helpers shared by asset preparation tools. Not a public workflow surface.

children.title: README.md
children.description: Prep Library contract: small shared helpers for prep tools only.

children.title: atomic_io.py
children.description: Atomic text, JSON, file-copy, and image-save helpers used by Python asset prep tools.

children.title: Conversion Prep
children.subtitle: format conversion
children.description: Conversion utilities that normalize source assets into inspectable or importable formats.

children.title: README.md
children.description: Conversion Prep contract: file conversion without license, storage, or runtime-loading decisions.

children.title: obj_to_glb.py
children.description: Blender headless OBJ/MTL to GLB converter with split-by-material output for engine-friendly meshes.

children.title: Source Sheet Prep
children.subtitle: chroma and component audit
children.description: Tools for generated UI/icon/sprite/decor source sheets: normalize border-connected chroma background and audit component count, gutters, borders, and key-color conflicts before cropping.

children.title: README.md
children.description: Source Sheet Prep command guide for normalize_chroma.py and audit_intake.py.

children.title: normalize_chroma.py
children.description: Normalizes border-connected chroma background pixels in generated source sheets without changing interior key-colored art.

children.title: audit_intake.py
children.description: Audits a source sheet for component separation, unsafe borders/gutters, and key-color conflicts before crop planning.

children.title: source_sheets/tests
children.description: Regression tests for source-sheet chroma normalization and intake audit behavior.

children.title: Crop Prep
children.subtitle: source-sheet split plans
children.description: Tools for splitting source sheets into named asset regions and future manual crop-boundary editing.

children.title: README.md
children.description: Crop Prep contract: crop plans and future boundary-editing ownership.

children.title: plan_prepared_crops_from_intake.py
children.description: Creates named crop-plan entries from a passing source-sheet intake audit.

children.title: plan_prepared_crops_from_intake_test.py
children.description: Regression tests for named crop-plan generation.

children.title: Cutout / Alpha Prep
children.subtitle: key matte and dual plate
children.description: Tools for alpha extraction, key-matte cleanup, dual-plate extraction, trim support, and transparent-edge hygiene.

children.title: README.md
children.description: Cutout Prep contract: alpha extraction, key matte, dual plate, and edge cleanup ownership.

children.title: key_matte.py
children.description: Single-background known-key cutout for opaque art and flat-key holes.

children.title: dual_plate_alpha.py
children.description: Extracts RGBA from aligned light/dark plate pairs for soft alpha, glow, glass, and shadow cases.

children.title: route_cutout.py
children.description: Chooses key-matte vs dual-plate path for a crop based on soft-alpha risk metrics.

children.title: Review Atlas
children.subtitle: visual contact sheets
children.description: Tools for building and auditing visual contact sheets used for source review. This is not engine integration output.

children.title: README.md
children.description: Review Atlas contract: visual contact sheets for inspection, not engine integration output.

children.title: build_review_atlas.py
children.description: Builds a labeled review atlas/contact sheet for prepared UI, icon, or sprite outputs.

children.title: audit_review_atlas.py
children.description: Audits review-atlas layout, labels, and source coverage.

children.title: Texture Prep
children.subtitle: tile preview and seam metrics
children.description: Tools for standalone material textures: generate 2x2 repeat previews and measure obvious edge mismatches before accepting a texture as tileable.

children.title: README.md
children.description: Texture Prep command guide for tileable texture seam audits and preview generation.

children.title: audit_tileable_texture.py
children.description: Writes a 2x2 texture preview and reports mean/max edge deltas for repeat-texture candidates.

children.title: audit_tileable_texture.test.py
children.description: Regression tests for tileable texture preview output and seam failure reporting.

children.title: Asset Workflow
children.subtitle: agent-facing asset work
children.description: Agent-facing workflows for asset creation and review. Coordinates provenance and generation records but does not own storage, prep, previews, or browser UI.

children.title: README.md
children.description: Asset Workflow contract: workflow tools coordinate asset work and provenance while storage/prep own their own domains.

children.title: Art Jobs
children.subtitle: generated-art provenance
children.description: Generated-art job scaffolding, generation records, source-family prompt packets, and generated-art contract validation.

children.title: README.md
children.description: Art Jobs contract: generated-art tasks, prompt packets, generation records, provenance, and validation boundaries.

children.title: new_art_job.mjs
children.description: Scaffolds a structured generated-art job for agent-readable iteration.

children.title: new_generation_record.mjs
children.description: Writes reproducible generation/provenance records for accepted source art.

children.title: validate_art_job.mjs
children.description: Validates generated-art job contracts before claiming accepted/final art.

children.title: Asset Viewer
children.subtitle: library and review gallery
children.description: Browser-facing asset gallery for library browsing, game-asset review, pick manifests, 3D model inspection, promotion, and reuse pulls.

children.title: README.md
children.description: Asset Viewer module contract: modes, commands, ownership boundaries, and why the gallery server remains separate.

children.title: Gallery Entry
children.subtitle: source picker inside gallery
children.description: Asset Viewer entry hosted at /viewer/. The gallery itself lists available sources and switches between all assets, template assets, and the current game.

children.title: index.html
children.description: Asset Viewer browser entry. It loads the existing gallery UI and lets the user choose the displayed asset source from inside the gallery header.

children.title: api.mjs
children.description: Studio Shell API adapter for listing asset sources, opening the selected source in the gallery, rebuilding/querying the asset index, and resolving gallery media.

children.title: build_review.mjs
children.description: Generates static asset gallery outputs for shared-library browsing, game-asset review, or direct asset-folder scans.

children.title: serve_gallery.mjs
children.description: Serves a generated asset gallery and maps a large external asset library at /lib/ so library browsing can avoid copying every media file.

children.title: promote.mjs
children.description: Promotes selected assets from a review manifest into Pack Manifest storage with license records and integrity data.

children.title: pull.mjs
children.description: Copies selected shared-library assets into a game-local asset tree while preserving source_id linkage and restricted-asset routing.

children.title: record_gallery.mjs
children.description: Records a browser session of the asset gallery for review or presentation evidence.

children.title: Surface Implementation
children.subtitle: viewer js/css
children.description: Static browser files copied into generated gallery outputs. Hidden from the default graph so Asset Viewer remains readable as one surface.

children.title: viewer.js
children.description: Vanilla browser SPA for filters, pack views, asset modal, picking, and model-viewer integration.

children.title: viewer.css
children.description: Asset Viewer page styling for gallery cards, filters, sheets, and model previews.

children.title: Tests
children.subtitle: asset viewer regressions
children.description: Regression tests for Asset Viewer generation and promotion behavior.

children.title: build_review.test.mjs
children.description: Regression tests for asset kind classification, origin detection, escaping, and gallery HTML rendering.

children.title: promote.test.mjs
children.description: Regression tests for promoting picked assets into Pack Manifest storage with license and integrity records.

children.title: Architecture Map
children.subtitle: tree renderer and map validation
children.description: Self-map for this AI Studio refactor tree: live HTML renderer, declarative tree data, and validation report for unmapped or stale files.

children.title: tree.json
children.description: Declarative source for the working ai_studio tree: hierarchy, node ids, manual labels, roles, tags, and explicit child order.
children.role: declarative source of the ai_studio tree

children.title: README.md
children.description: Architecture Map module contract: tree.json is architecture truth, index.html only renders, validate_map.mjs only audits.

children.title: Architecture Map Surface
children.description: Browser surface and renderer for tree.json and validation-report.json. It is hosted by Studio Shell but owned by Architecture Map.

children.title: validate_map.mjs
children.description: Scans known AI Studio and legacy pipeline paths and writes validation-report.json with unmapped, missing, duplicate, and underspecified files.
children.role: architecture map scanner and report writer

children.title: validation-report.json
children.description: Generated report displayed by the map page so newly created or unmapped files are visible during refactoring.

children.title: validate_map.test.mjs
children.description: Regression tests for missing, duplicate, unmapped, and mapped-directory validation behavior.

children.title: Game Design
children.subtitle: GDD and design knowledge workflows
children.description: Reviewed AI Studio game-design workflow module. Owns primary GDD workflow, source routing, and reusable design knowledge workflow docs; durable design content remains in gamedesign/.

children.title: README.md
children.description: Game Design module contract: workflow ownership and boundary with durable gamedesign content.

children.title: Primary GDD Workflow
children.subtitle: concept to first playable
children.description: Workflow docs for turning a game idea into scoped GDD gates, gameplay loop data, visual proof, web GDD surfaces, and implementation handoff.

children.title: README.md
children.description: Primary GDD Workflow contract: role, use cases, flow, files, and skill surface.

children.title: core_workflow.md
children.description: Core GDD gates, minimum artifacts, start checklist, rehydrate protocol, report shape, and stop rules.

children.title: creative_intake.md
children.description: Short intake loop for unclear taste, meme anchors, visual targets, gameplay fantasy, or acceptance criteria.

children.title: design_stewardship.md
children.description: Rules for updating existing design docs without drift and keeping specs implementation-facing.

children.title: gameplay_systems.md
children.description: Player verbs, core loop, UI minimum, first slice, economy, and challenge contract guidance.

children.title: visual_proof.md
children.description: Visual proof tiers, fake shot requirements, runtime asset proof, and review packet guidance.

children.title: implementation_handoff.md
children.description: Source order, first playable packet, task breakdown, acceptance gates, and next prompt shape.

children.title: web_gdd_site.md
children.description: Visual GDD website requirements, sections, source-of-truth rules, and validation.

children.title: review.md
children.description: GDD-specific review stance, gate review, and routing to Quality rules.

children.title: templates.md
children.description: Small templates for Definition of Done, design decisions, reference rows, risk gates, and final status.

children.title: Design Knowledge Workflow
children.subtitle: source routing and promotion
children.description: Workflow docs for design source routing, source intake, reference-backed work, reusable knowledge promotion, and file templates.

children.title: README.md
children.description: Design Knowledge Workflow contract: data boundaries and file roles.

children.title: source_routing.md
children.description: Routing rules for reusable source notes, reusable knowledge, project wiki material, tasks, and temporary scratch data.

children.title: source_intake_promotion.md
children.description: Source intake and promotion workflow: source quality, evidence labels, and when to update knowledge indexes/logs.

children.title: reference_work_review.md
children.description: Reference-driven design work and review checklist for named references that guide gameplay, UI, economy, balance, art, or implementation decisions.

children.title: templates.md
children.description: Templates for reusable source notes, reusable knowledge pages, project source notes, and source review reports.

children.title: nt-primary-gdd
children.description: Skill surface for turning game concepts into scoped first playable GDDs through AI Studio Game Design workflow docs.

children.title: nt-design-knowledge
children.description: Skill surface for routing design sources and reusable game-design knowledge through the AI Studio Game Design workflow.

children.title: Quality
children.subtitle: small rule set
children.description: Reviewed quality module: numbered markdown checks with 001 as the base rule, lightweight quality evidence, and rule-usage profiling.

children.title: README.md
children.description: Quality module entrypoint: rule selection, group boundaries, numbered checks, evidence recording, and profiling.

children.title: nt-quality-checks
children.description: Codex-discoverable quality-check skill that routes agents through AI Studio quality groups, matching rule files, outcome logging, and usage profiling.

children.title: Rule Groups
children.subtitle: numbered checks
children.description: Grouped quality rules. Read each matching group README, use the 001 rule when it matches, then only the higher-numbered checks needed for the task.

children.title: Player Clarity Rules
children.subtitle: QCLR
children.description: Rules for UI/UX, HUD, scene clarity, sprite readability/state clarity, feedback, interactive elements, responsive viewports, virtual controls, and player-facing presentation.

children.title: README.md
children.description: Player Clarity rule group router for screen state, responsive viewports, and virtual controls.

children.title: QCLR_001 Player Clarity
children.description: Check basic player-facing clarity: visible output, readable important information, visible actions and objects, and understandable next action.

children.title: QCLR_002 Responsive Viewports
children.description: Check 4:3, 16:9, and tall-phone viewport/orientation layouts for cropped, hidden, overlapped, or misplaced player-facing UI.

children.title: QCLR_003 Virtual Controls
children.description: Check mobile/touch controls, virtual buttons, joystick zones, and control hints for visibility, reachability, overlap, and clarity.

children.title: Art Rules
children.subtitle: QART
children.description: Rules for player-facing visuals, generated art, screenshots, visual targets, and avoiding debug/placeholder defaults.

children.title: README.md
children.description: Art rule group router for player-facing visuals, generated art, screenshots, visual targets, and style/appearance fit.

children.title: QART_001 Closest Practical Visual
children.description: Check that player-facing visuals do not default to debug shapes, placeholder art, or temporary overlays when a better visual can be created, sourced, or adapted.

children.title: GDD Rules
children.subtitle: QGDD
children.description: Rules for design source packages, source order, file roles, contradictions, requirements, acceptance criteria, and implementation-facing specs.

children.title: README.md
children.description: GDD rule group router for design source packages, source order, file roles, cross-file contradictions, and acceptance proof.

children.title: QGDD_001 Design Source Readiness
children.description: Check GDD/spec/table/data/handoff packages as current source of truth: entrypoint, file roles, decisions, open questions, contradictions, and proof.

children.title: Game Design Rules
children.subtitle: QDES
children.description: Rules for playable loops, player motivation, economy, progression, feature fit, rewards, challenge, first slices, and design data.

children.title: README.md
children.description: Game design rule group router for gameplay loops, motivation, economy, progression, rewards, challenge, first slices, and design data.

children.title: QDES_001 Playable Loop
children.description: Check gameplay model, player action, system response, visible progress/reward, repeat reason, next hook, dead/confusing states, and feature fit.

children.title: Technical Rules
children.subtitle: QTECH
children.description: Rules for code, scripts, generated data, runtime behavior, build/run proof, input, state, save/load, packaging, and automation.

children.title: README.md
children.description: Technical rule group router for QTECH_001 behavior evidence.

children.title: QTECH_001 Behavior Evidence
children.description: Check changed technical claims with the narrowest useful proof: test, command, parser/schema, build/pack, launch/smoke, scenario, log, or generated-output check.

children.title: Asset Rules
children.subtitle: QASSET
children.description: Rules for sourced, generated, and prepared assets; provenance; licenses; manifests; publishability; game-use-ready formats; and material readiness.

children.title: README.md
children.description: Asset rule group router for added/changed assets, project-use, publishability, game-use-ready, player-facing, and material-dependent claims.

children.title: QASSET_001 Asset Readiness
children.description: Check accepted/project assets for source/provenance/origin, committed integrity, license/publish routing, project-local paths, runtime format/path, and load/render proof.

children.title: QASSET_002 Material Readiness
children.description: Check material-dependent assets for textures, UVs, colors, material maps, material assignment, and stage-appropriate material proof.

children.title: profile.mjs
children.description: Scans task logs for Quality rule outcome lines and summarizes rule usage, pass, block, review, and skip counts.

children.title: profile.test.mjs
children.description: Regression tests for quality rule usage profiling from task logs.

children.title: Not Refactored
children.subtitle: current scattered pipeline
children.description: Everything that exists today but has not yet been reviewed, cleaned, assigned an owner, and moved into the main ai_studio tree.

children.title: Legacy Pipeline Routes
children.subtitle: known old docs/tools
children.description: Known pre-refactor pipeline docs and tools. They are intentionally visible as not-refactored until each one is reviewed, moved to an owning module, or deleted.

children.title: tools/README.md
children.description: Legacy tools route map. Keep visible until tool ownership is split across AI Studio modules.

children.title: profiling-reuse.md
children.description: Legacy profiling, reuse, closeout, and export reference awaiting ownership review.
